name: Leon Kennedy
description:
"I felt something wasn't right after reading the message you left me. I just couldn't ignore it."

❥︎ AnyPOV, Possible Strangers to lovers, Slow burn

You wanted to be anything but a rookie. Even if you're thrilled about the rumor of a new recruit, the city is in disarray the day before he starts. Even when you advise him not to come in over the phone, he still shows up a week later. It appears that you have outgrown your rookie status.Tbh I got this idea from a tumblr post and really wanted to write it out😭
creator: MiriMosaa
